mapper.select: SELECT id, post_id, author_id, parent_id, content, depth, deleted, created_at FROM comments WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments(post_id, author_id, parent_id, content, depth, deleted, created_at) VALUES(#{postId}, #{authorId}, #{parentId}, #{content}, #{depth}, #{deleted}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET deleted = #{deleted} WHERE id = #{id}
